zh.La Rochelle 8e Canton, La Rochelle, Char: 法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫-馬利拉 洛爾
zh.lifeSummary: Matturin Allard於1650年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫-馬利拉 洛爾。他於1718年2月22日與Rebecca Bacon在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可結婚。他去世於1737年6月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可享年87歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州文達哈姆武德斯托可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Matturin Allard于1650年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫-馬利拉 洛爾。他于1718年2月22日与Rebecca Bacon在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可结婚。他去世于1737年6月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可享年87岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: Allard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gilles, Andre, Emile, Normand, Marcel, Alain, Armand, Gaston, Pierre, Antoine, Benoit, Fernand.

English: from a Middle English personal name, Alard, Adelard, Aylard, or Elard. The former two names are usually of native English origin, from Old English Æthelheard, composed of the elements æthel ‘noble’ + heard ‘hard, bold’. Alternatively, the surname may be of continental origin, from an ancient Germanic name (see 2 below), which developed in Old French to Alard, and in Middle Dutch to Adelaert and Alaert. The continental names were used in post-Conquest England by Normans and Flemings. Later development of -ard to -ett and -att in surnames means that these personal names may also lie behind some examples of e.g. Allatt and Hallett .
French: from the medieval personal name Alard, from ancient Germanic Adelhard, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘hardy’. Compare Allar , Allor , Allord , and Allore .

variants.name: Ellerd
meanings: English (Bedfordshire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Allard  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.
Probably an altered form of German Ellert, a variant of Ehlert.

variants.name: Ellert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Merwin, Traude.

variants.name: Hallett
meanings: English (mainly Somerset and Dorset): variant of Allatt, itself a variant of Allard , with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Matturin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Emile, Pierre, Serge, Alain, Andree, Armand, Carmelle, Donat, Etienne, Germain, Jean-Paul.

French and West Indian (mainly Haiti and Saint Lucia): from the French personal name Mathurin, from the Latin name Maturinus (a derivative of the adjective maturus ‘ripe’), borne by a 3rd-century Christian saint who was responsible for spreading the gospel in the district of Sens.

variants.name: Maturin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Sylvain.  Dutch Derk.

French: variant of Mathurin and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Maturin, which is very rare in France, was also taken to Britain and Ireland by Huguenot refugees, but has now almost died out there.

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.

en.lifeSummary: Matturin Allard was born in 1650, in La Rochelle, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, France. He married Rebecca Bacon on 22 February 1718, in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 27 June 1737, in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 87, and was buried in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Matturin Allard est né en 1650, à La Rochelle, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, France. Il a épousé Rebecca Bacon le 22 février 1718, à Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 27 juin 1737, à Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, États-Unis.

ja.La Rochelle 8e Canton, La Rochelle, Char: フランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエンテ-マリティメラ ロチェル
ja.lifeSummary: Matturin Allardは1650年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエンテ-マリティメラ ロチェルで生まれた。1718年2月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックでRebecca Baconと結婚した。彼は1737年6月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックで87歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックにて埋葬された。

ko.Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡
ko.Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡
ko.lifeSummary: Matturin Allard(은)는 1650년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처테-마이팀 라 로셸에서 태어났다. 그는 1718년 2월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에서 Rebecca Bacon(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1737년 6월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Matturin Allard nasceu em 1650, em La Rochelle, Charente-Maritime, Poitou-Charentes, França. Ele casou-se com Rebecca Bacon em 22 de fevereiro de 1718, em Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 27 de junho de 1737, em Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Matturin Allard родился в 1650 г. в местности ла рошелл, чаренте-маритим, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebecca Bacon 22 февраля 1718 г. в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 27 июня 1737 г. в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con Rebecca Bacon el 22 de febrero de 1718, en Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 27 de junio de 1737, en Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
